executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Whole-stack certification remains blocked by external marketing owner-loop — marketing independent verification is stale (2026-06-02) and verdict=fail.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable outcome evidence and rerun its independent verification before whole-stack green.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

findings.title: Marketing independent verification remains fail — external blocker
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification artifact is stale (2026-06-02, ~5030 min) and verdict=fail. Primary-repo adoption evidence still missing.
findings.root_cause: Marketing owner loop has not produced fresh outcome evidence or rerun its independent verification.
findings.recommended_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable outcome evidence and rerun its independent verification.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology clean — 19 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, 0 errors
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection confirms zero live topology issues.
findings.recommended_fix: Sustain direct cron inspection as source of truth on each watchdog run.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path green — all freshness and ownership gates pass
findings.mechanism: Verifier ok=true, independent verification qualified_pass, loop integrity ok, health-monitor issues are externally classified.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates are healthy; remaining risk is external.
findings.recommended_fix: Continue independent verification on each material architecture artifact refresh.

findings.title: Persisted disabled jobs remain history only — zero live disabled jobs
findings.mechanism: Historical records in jobs.json may contain disabled entries, but live topology has zero disabled jobs.
findings.root_cause: Historical scheduler records persist after cleanup; not a live issue.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep separating persisted disabled history from live runtime topology.

findings.title: Loop "pypi-auto-unblocker" has NO self-improvement mandate
findings.mechanism: Script UNKNOWN. When outcomes are flat, this loop repeats the same tactics forever without redesign.
findings.root_cause: Loop created without self-improvement mandate or third-party verification requirement.
findings.recommended_fix: Add self_improvement_mandate: detect flat outcomes for N runs, trigger redesign pass, register in self_improvement_loops.json, require independent third-party signoff.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh outcome evidence and rerun independent verification
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Only remaining blocker for whole-stack green certification.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed outcome ownership.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Add self-improvement mandate to pypi-auto-unblocker loop
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Prevent infinite flat-outcome loop without redesign capability.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Loop gains ability to detect stagnation and trigger redesign.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Refreshed from live openclaw cron list --json: 19 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, 0 errors.
Verifier ok=true after re-running independent verification to clear freshness-gate mismatch. All architecture-owned gates pass.
Both watched loops (ralph-docs-watchdog, agent-architecture-watchdog) status=ok. No topology/ownership drift.
19 loops audited. 18/18 have self-repair, 18/19 have self-improve. 1 gap: pypi-auto-unblocker missing self-improve.
Single remaining blocker is external: marketing independent verification (stale, fail). Architecture-owned gates all green.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms architecture verifier passes freshness gates, loop topology/ownership checks green, shared market-intelligence reuse machine-verifiable. External blocker: marketing independent verification stale/fail.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing independent verification remains fail (stale since 2026-06-02)
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned runtime checks are coherent, but marketing independent verification still fails closed because primary-repo movement is still measurement-pending.

notes: Architecture green means architecture-owned verifier path is coherent; it does not mean the whole stack is green.
The single live blocker is external: marketing independent verification (stale since 2026-06-02, verdict=fail).
Live topology: 19 jobs, 19 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, 0 errors.
No live timeout-budget repair was needed this run.
